ksa_text: Conduct data and AI strategy engagements, including current state assessment, future state design, gap analysis, and roadmap development with defined milestones and investment estimates.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ability to monitor and assess the potential impact of emerging technologies on laws, regulations, and/or policies.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Ability to monitor and assess the potential impact of emerging technologies on laws, regulations, and/or policies.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-T-014 (DG, Task) maps to Digital Evaluator scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4749 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.475, eu_ai_act=0.439, ddat=0.420. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within digital program evaluation, performance analytics, and evidence-based assessment.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4749 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA DG-T-014 (DG, composite 0.4749) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Survey of DAMA DMBOK governance competencies; governance awareness at practitioner level appears in O*NET 15-2051 expanded skill sets does not surface this DG-domain content as a core or common requirement for IC-to-senior-IC data analyst roles. Score 0.4749 may reflect incidental framework overlap. Without direct analytics-domain text confirmation, external ground truth does not support inclusion at this signal level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include overturned. Insufficient external evidence for DG domain content at composite 0.4749 without confirming text signals. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P4 external ground truth. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.4749, domain DG. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
